---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new example or improvement
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work.

## Additional Context
Add any references or links that might be helpful.
